title: Group "Overall Sum of Column Incorrect"

posts.author: ieller (Ian Eller)
posts.cookedHtml: Image below. No hidden rows. The column shows a $0 sum when that is clearly not the case. The two green columns are roll ups from sub items. The total on the right is a formula column summing the roll up columns. I assume I have some setting wrong but for the life of me can’t figure out what it is.
